calendar.matters:
First And Final Account And Report Of Successor Trustee; And Petition For Order: 1) Settling And Approving Account And Report; 2) Approving Successor Trustees Fees; 3) Approving Attorneys Fees And Costs; And 4) For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stacie Nelson appeared by zoom for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mrs. Nelson addressed the issues raised in the probate examiner's notes. The First and Final Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to allow the accounting and grant the other relief requested.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
